name: Suspicious Behavior by SOURGUM Actor
notes:
This rule detects suspicious behavior by SOURGUM actor.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: MSTIC, FPT.EagleEye
SIGMA Title: SOURGUM Actor Behaviours
SIGMA Description: Suspicious behaviours related to an actor tracked by Microsoft as SOURGUM


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (( LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\physmem.sys%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\shared\wimbootconfigurations.ini%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\imejp\wimbootconfigurations.ini%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\imetc\wimbootconfigurations.ini%' ) OR ( ( ( LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\filepath2%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime%' ) AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% reg add%' ) AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%hkey_local_machine\software\classes\clsid\{7c857801-7381-11cf-884d-00aa004b2e24}\inprocserver32%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%hkey_local_machine\software\classes\clsid\{cf4cc405-e2c5-4ddd-b3ce-5e7582d8c9fa}\inprocserver32%' ) )) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Behavior by SOURGUM Actor on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ((     LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\physmem.sys%' 	OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\shared\wimbootconfigurations.ini%' 	OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\imejp\wimbootconfigurations.ini%' 	OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime\imetc\wimbootconfigurations.ini%'	 ) OR ( 	( 		( 			LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\filepath2%' 			OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%windows\system32\ime%' 		)  		AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% reg add%' 	) 	AND  	( 		LOWER("Command") LIKE '%hkey_local_machine\software\classes\clsid\{7c857801-7381-11cf-884d-00aa004b2e24}\inprocserver32%' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%hkey_local_machine\software\classes\clsid\{cf4cc405-e2c5-4ddd-b3ce-5e7582d8c9fa}\inprocserver32%' 	) )) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Behavior by SOURGUM Actor
Event description: Detects suspicious behavior by SOURGUM actor.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
